Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Date.now` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

D:\pqs-rtn-hybrid-storage\src\components\NavigationDashboard.tsx:45:29
  43 |     const totalEvents = events.length
  44 |     // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/purity
> 45 |     const sessionDuration = Date.now() - (events[0]?.timestamp || Date.now())
     |                             ^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  46 |     const eventsPerMinute = totalEvents > 0 ? (totalEvents / (sessionDuration / 60000)).toFixed(2) : '0'
  47 |     
  48 |     return {

Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Date.now` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

D:\pqs-rtn-hybrid-storage\src\components\NavigationDashboard.tsx:45:67
  43 |     const totalEvents = events.length
  44 |     // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/purity
> 45 |     const sessionDuration = Date.now() - (events[0]?.timestamp || Date.now())
     |                                                                   ^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  46 |     const eventsPerMinute = totalEvents > 0 ? (totalEvents / (sessionDuration / 60000)).toFixed(2) : '0'
  47 |     
  48 |     return {
